meta.title: SafeMatch AI | Where Should I Live in Istanbul?
meta.description: An AI-powered decision platform that evaluates earthquake safety and quality of life together.

hero.badge: THE RIGHT DECISION FOR SAFER TOMORROWS
hero.description: An AI-powered decision platform that evaluates earthquake safety and quality of life together.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: We find the best-fit neighborhood for you in three steps.

steps.title: Create your profile
steps.description: Describe your lifestyle and needs with a few quick questions.

steps.title: Set your priorities
steps.description: Weight criteria like earthquake safety, transport, and education to your own needs.

steps.title: Discover the best-fit neighborhood
steps.description: Get explainable, personalized recommendations from our AI analysis.

criteria.title: Comprehensive Analysis Criteria
criteria.description: We evaluate every neighborhood across six core dimensions, using multi-layered data.

items.title: Earthquake Safety
items.description: Risk analysis using soil surveys, fault-line proximity, and building stock data.

items.title: Transportation
items.description: Public transit access, proximity to main arteries, and traffic density.

items.title: Healthcare
items.description: Distance to hospitals, family health centers, and emergency response points.

items.title: Education
items.description: School density, quality indicators, and accessibility.

items.title: Assembly Areas
items.description: Adequacy of post-disaster emergency assembly and shelter areas.

items.title: Social Life
items.description: Richness of parks, social amenities, and everyday conveniences.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: Our analyses are built on official and open data sources.

cta.title: Discover the right neighborhood for you in Istanbul.

step1.title: What kind of life do you picture in Istanbul?
step1.description: Let's get to know you in a few quick steps — no boring forms, just your ideal life.

step2.title: What's your lifestyle profile?
step2.description: Pick every card that fits you.

options.title: Family Focused
options.description: Schools, parks, and safety come first for me.

options.title: City Life
options.description: I want an energetic, central, lively life.

options.title: Calm Living
options.description: I want a peaceful, green, quiet environment.

options.title: Career Focused
options.description: Proximity to work and easy commuting matter.

options.title: Social Life
options.description: Cafes, events, and my circle of friends matter.

options.title: Budget Friendly
options.description: I'm looking for an affordable place to live.

step3.title: What's your family structure?
step3.description: Pick the option that fits you best.

step4.title: What's your work arrangement?
step4.description: If you pick office, we'll work out your commute together.
step4.mapPrompt: Pin your office location on the map
step4.mapClickHint: Click the map to pin your location (you can also drag the marker to adjust it).
step4.addressUnavailable: Couldn't resolve an address, but the location was saved.

step5.title: What matters most to you?
step5.description: Choose an importance level for each criterion.

step6.title: Tell us about your dream neighborhood
step6.description: Write whatever comes to mind — the AI fills in the rest.
step6.placeholder: For example: I'd love a coffee shop I can walk to in the morning, a sunny apartment, and real peace of mind about earthquakes...

step7.title: Here's what we understood
step7.description: Tap a tag to edit it.

footer.tagline: AI-powered neighborhood decision platform for Istanbul.

results.title: Your Personalized Neighborhood Recommendations
results.subtitle: Istanbul neighborhoods scored against your priorities, best match first.
results.errorBody: We couldn't reach the server, or something went wrong. Please try again.
results.matchTickWarning: You prioritized {criterion}, but this neighborhood scores low
results.earthquakeNote: Earthquake safety is always evaluated, regardless of your priority.
results.emptyBody: You need to complete the profile form first.

about.title: About
about.body: SafeMatch AI is an AI-powered decision support system that offers personalized neighborhood recommendations for people who will live in Istanbul, centered on earthquake safety and quality-of-life criteria.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: Recommendations provided by SafeMatch AI are for informational purposes only and do not replace an official risk report or expert opinion. We recommend consulting official institutions and experts before making relocation decisions.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.body: Our analyses use data from official and open sources such as AFAD, IMM, TurkStat, MTA, OSM, and DASK.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.body: This page will be built in an upcoming sprint.
